scope: M73-M76 Round of 32 90-minute quantitative predictions; no betting advice

method.engine: Independent Poisson from final xG, 0-0 to 5-5 matrix with tail above matrix retained.
method.market_treatment: No odds shift because same-source odds snapshot is missing.
method.lineup_treatment: Data-collector probable XI retained for all eight teams. Official T-75 XI remains missing, so confidence remains capped.
method.tactical_treatment: Tactics-coach ten-factor matchup package absorbed. Adjustments are conservative and capped to avoid double counting player_state or group-stage form.
method.tail_treatment: Strong-favorite ceiling and low-event draw floors are expressed through final xG and explicit tail-shape notes; no unsupported manual matrix mass injection.

factor_weights.notes: Market weight set to 0.00 because same-source odds snapshot is missing. Knockout context is small and does not replace team/tactical factors.

gaps_and_conflicts: Data collector packet is partial_source_limited, not complete final team news.
Tactics-coach ten-factor packet is available and absorbed, but remains partial_source_limited.
Official T-75 XI is still not available.
Complete same-source odds chain is missing or incomplete.

factor_inputs.baseline_strength: South Africa kept a structured underdog profile from group play; Canada rate higher on athletic upside and host-continent tempo but remain volatile in settled possession.
factor_inputs.attack: South Africa chance creation is lower-volume and set-piece/counter dependent; Canada have David/Larin/Davies/Buchanan transition and box-arrival routes.
factor_inputs.defense: South Africa defensive resilience and goalkeeper signal keep the match from a simple favorite script; Canada transition defense is the main leakage risk.
factor_inputs.player_state: Canada attacking core rates above South Africa, but Kone/minutes risk and role choices cap confidence. South Africa Mokoena/Williams spine supports low-event survival.
factor_inputs.injury_suspension_minutes: No data-thread injury packet available. Treat Canada central-midfield availability and South Africa attacking minutes as recheck items.
factor_inputs.tactical_matchup: 南非的最优脚本是 Broos 式中低位压缩、Williams 稳定门前、Mokoena 管理二点和定位球；加拿大的最优脚本是 Marsch 式高强度压迫和纵向转换。对模型最关键的不是谁控球，而是加拿大核心可用性是否足以支撑连续压迫，以及南非能否把比赛拖入低事件节奏。
factor_inputs.schedule_environment: Los Angeles noon host kickoff creates heat/tempo uncertainty. Canada travel context is relatively familiar but not enough for a large bonus.
factor_inputs.market: Incomplete external market snippet only; no overround-adjusted same-source calibration.

south_africa.rank_source: round-of-32 bracket marks South Africa as 2A; local A组 third-round postmatch file not present
trend_notes: 首轮负于墨西哥后防守压力明显
第二轮靠 Teboho Mokoena 第83分钟点球拿到生机
公开队闻称末轮击败韩国并首次进入淘汰赛

canada.rank_source: B组第三轮复盘 and bracket mark Canada as 2B
trend_notes: 两轮后4分且净胜球优势大
第三轮负瑞士后列B组第二
Jonathan David/Cyle Larin/Promise David 攻击状态为主要本地正信号

south_africa.note: 本地旧状态为 suspended；Guardian 队闻称 return。

canada.note: Guardian 报道 set to return after ACL injury。

南非.tactical_summary: 南非的最优脚本是 Broos 式中低位压缩、Williams 稳定门前、Mokoena 管理二点和定位球；加拿大的最优脚本是 Marsch 式高强度压迫和纵向转换。对模型最关键的不是谁控球，而是加拿大核心可用性是否足以支撑连续压迫，以及南非能否把比赛拖入低事件节奏。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Small negative only; this is a choice to conserve structure, not a full defensive downgrade.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Cap near neutral unless T-75 confirms conservative midfield and full-strength goalkeeper.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Do not combine with a large open-play attack upgrade; this is situational chance quality.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Only raise risk if South Africa concede first or start a more attacking XI.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Limit magnitude if Davies is unavailable or minute-limited.

central_control_advantage.model_note: Official midfields decide sign; keep neutral until lineup refresh.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Cap because complete taker-target map is missing.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Positive means reduced risk; flip if South Africa must chase early.

coach_substitution_risk.model_note: No large coaching penalty; use as stability marker.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Apply to low-event and one-goal game states, not raw win probability.

model_should_adjust: Canada transition and press are conditional on core availability
South Africa low-event resistance deserves a draw/low-tempo floor but not an open-play attack boost
red_team_should_challenge: whether South Africa's A-group survival signal is stale without final group-round data

加拿大.tactical_summary: 南非的最优脚本是 Broos 式中低位压缩、Williams 稳定门前、Mokoena 管理二点和定位球；加拿大的最优脚本是 Marsch 式高强度压迫和纵向转换。对模型最关键的不是谁控球，而是加拿大核心可用性是否足以支撑连续压迫，以及南非能否把比赛拖入低事件节奏。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Use conditional positive; halve if Eustaquio/Kone/Davies are not in functional minutes.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Do not add more than small positive before T-75.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Avoid double counting with player_state attacking form; cap if Davies absent.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Negative means higher risk; feed into opponent counter/set-piece transition windows.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Davies availability is the cap switch.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Link to South Africa direct-outlet chances rather than broad defense downgrade.

coach_substitution_risk.model_note: Treat as slight volatility, not pure penalty.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Raises event volatility after first goal.

model_should_adjust: Canada transition and press are conditional on core availability
South Africa low-event resistance deserves a draw/low-tempo floor but not an open-play attack boost
red_team_should_challenge: whether South Africa's A-group survival signal is stale without final group-round data

factor_inputs.baseline_strength: Germany carry top-tier attack and round-one ceiling signal; Paraguay are competitive but profile as third-place underdog after defensive volatility.
factor_inputs.attack: Germany have Musiala/Wirtz/Kimmich creative density plus set-piece and secondary runners. Paraguay rely on Almiron/Enciso transition and set pieces.
factor_inputs.defense: Germany defense is strong but can expose space when fullbacks push. Paraguay defensive floor was downgraded after heavy concession paths.
factor_inputs.player_state: Germany core availability assumed probable_not_official; Paraguay key attackers are dangerous but support platform is less stable.
factor_inputs.injury_suspension_minutes: No data-thread injury packet available. Rotation and late fitness checks remain open.
factor_inputs.tactical_matchup: 德国仍有最高技术密度、前场反抢和多点攻击，但厄瓜多尔 2-1 德国复盘要求限制强队模板外推：若德国节奏管理下降，防守转换会被放大。巴拉圭更像 Alfaro 式低位、反击和定位球队；土耳其 0-1 巴拉圭证明其十人低位韧性，但美国 4-1 巴拉圭也暴露早丢球后结构散开。
factor_inputs.schedule_environment: Boston late afternoon conditions are moderate; no major travel edge applied.
factor_inputs.market: No complete same-source odds snapshot available.

德国.tactical_summary: 德国仍有最高技术密度、前场反抢和多点攻击，但厄瓜多尔 2-1 德国复盘要求限制强队模板外推：若德国节奏管理下降，防守转换会被放大。巴拉圭更像 Alfaro 式低位、反击和定位球队；土耳其 0-1 巴拉圭证明其十人低位韧性，但美国 4-1 巴拉圭也暴露早丢球后结构散开。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Do not stack with raw attack ceiling from Curacao 7-1; this is phase pressure.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Reduce if central controller absent or Paraguay front two press aggressively.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Cap because Ecuador match showed control and recovery can dip.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Negative risk applies when fullbacks push and rest defense is thin.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Do not overstate if Germany pick a narrow control XI.

central_control_advantage.model_note: Use as tempo/progression edge, not automatic scoring conversion.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Small edge only because full taker-target maps are missing.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Treat as conditional volatility rather than broad defensive downgrade.

coach_substitution_risk.model_note: Positive bench flexibility; cap if lineup rotation is heavy.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Knockout reduces rotation drag but not transition-control risk.

model_should_adjust: Germany central/press edges are real but transition defense must stay in the tail
Paraguay set-piece and low-block survival need a separate upset/low-event branch
red_team_should_challenge: Germany overreward from Curacao 7-1 versus Ecuador loss context

巴拉圭.tactical_summary: 德国仍有最高技术密度、前场反抢和多点攻击，但厄瓜多尔 2-1 德国复盘要求限制强队模板外推：若德国节奏管理下降，防守转换会被放大。巴拉圭更像 Alfaro 式低位、反击和定位球队；土耳其 0-1 巴拉圭证明其十人低位韧性，但美国 4-1 巴拉圭也暴露早丢球后结构散开。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Negative press does not equal weak defense; it signals lower active regain.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Cap if Paraguay use back five and long outlet successfully.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Availability-dependent; do not duplicate individual player_state boosts.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Apply strongly if Paraguay concede first.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Reduce if Paraguay select a back five.

central_control_advantage.model_note: Model as territory loss, not automatic collapse.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Cap because Germany also strong aerially and full map missing.

model_should_adjust: Germany central/press edges are real but transition defense must stay in the tail
Paraguay set-piece and low-block survival need a separate upset/low-event branch
red_team_should_challenge: Germany overreward from Curacao 7-1 versus Ecuador loss context

factor_inputs.baseline_strength: Netherlands hold a narrow power edge; Morocco rate close because defensive floor and tournament structure are strong.
factor_inputs.attack: Netherlands have wide/fullback and half-space creation; Morocco have Hakimi/Brahim/Ziyech transition and final-third quality.
factor_inputs.defense: Morocco defensive compactness is a major draw/upset stabilizer. Netherlands defense is good but transition-space risk remains.
factor_inputs.player_state: Netherlands core quality is high but recent draw signal lowers stability. Morocco spine is coherent if Bounou/Hakimi/Amrabat/Aguerd are available.
factor_inputs.injury_suspension_minutes: No data-thread injury packet available; both XI and minutes loads require T-75 recheck.
factor_inputs.tactical_matchup: 荷兰的小组后两场显示边路、多点进球和三球尾部仍强；摩洛哥则以右路 Hakimi、替补冲击和防守压缩为核心，但 4-2 海地说明其干净零封假设变脆。核心对位是荷兰中后场推进与高点定位球，碰上摩洛哥右路转换和低位防守韧性。
factor_inputs.schedule_environment: Monterrey evening reduces heat risk, but venue/travel still keep tempo uncertainty.
factor_inputs.market: No complete same-source odds snapshot available.

荷兰.tactical_summary: 荷兰的小组后两场显示边路、多点进球和三球尾部仍强；摩洛哥则以右路 Hakimi、替补冲击和防守压缩为核心，但 4-2 海地说明其干净零封假设变脆。核心对位是荷兰中后场推进与高点定位球，碰上摩洛哥右路转换和低位防守韧性。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Do not treat as constant high press; Morocco can bypass through Hakimi.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Separate from generic attack rating; cap after two high-output matches to avoid overfit.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Key risk against Hakimi/Brahim/Rahimi counter channels.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Use as slight edge, not dominant.

central_control_advantage.model_note: May not convert to high xG if Morocco block remains compact.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Cap due to Morocco aerial quality.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Tie to Moroccan right-side outlet availability.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Keep favorite third-goal tail alive without issuing score prediction.

model_should_adjust: Netherlands wide/set-piece edge is real but Morocco transition prevents over-clean-sheet assumptions
Morocco late bench and Hakimi channel should be a separate counter branch
red_team_should_challenge: Are Netherlands outputs inflated by Sweden/Tunisia contexts
Is Morocco clean-sheet reputation stale after Haiti 4-2

摩洛哥.tactical_summary: 荷兰的小组后两场显示边路、多点进球和三球尾部仍强；摩洛哥则以右路 Hakimi、替补冲击和防守压缩为核心，但 4-2 海地说明其干净零封假设变脆。核心对位是荷兰中后场推进与高点定位球，碰上摩洛哥右路转换和低位防守韧性。

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Keep near neutral unless official XI confirms strongest ball carriers.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Avoid double count with Hakimi/Rahimi player_state; apply as matchup to Dutch transition-defense gaps.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Negative risk grows if fullbacks push high.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Model as asymmetric right-side edge, not whole-pitch advantage.

central_control_advantage.model_note: Can still defend the center well; do not turn into large xG penalty.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Neutral until set-piece map and lineups are confirmed.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Positive means lower line risk in base game state.

coach_substitution_risk.model_note: Use as late xG support, not starter-quality upgrade.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Bifurcate leading compactness and trailing openness.

model_should_adjust: Netherlands wide/set-piece edge is real but Morocco transition prevents over-clean-sheet assumptions
Morocco late bench and Hakimi channel should be a separate counter branch
red_team_should_challenge: Are Netherlands outputs inflated by Sweden/Tunisia contexts
Is Morocco clean-sheet reputation stale after Haiti 4-2

factor_inputs.baseline_strength: Brazil remain elite by squad depth and creation ceiling; Japan are a mid-upper opponent with Netherlands draw signal and tactical discipline.
factor_inputs.attack: Brazil have Vinicius/Rodrygo/Raphinha/Endrick shot creation layers. Japan rely on Kubo/Mitoma/Doan transition and combination play.
factor_inputs.defense: Brazil defense is high quality but can be stretched if fullbacks and midfield lose rest defense. Japan defensive structure is strong but set-piece defense remains a risk.
factor_inputs.player_state: Brazil depth supports late scoring; Japan form signal is positive but opponent-specific availability must be rechecked.
factor_inputs.injury_suspension_minutes: No data-thread injury packet available; Japan Mitoma/Tomiyasu role availability and Brazil forward rotation are key rechecks.
factor_inputs.tactical_matchup: 巴西在苏格兰 0-3 中通过 Vinicius 左路和 Bruno Guimaraes 肋部输送兑现早球/继续进攻尾部；日本则通过纪律、边路组织和瑞典 1-1 的比赛管理证明强队对抗和低事件平局能力。关键是巴西左路个人突破与日本整体压迫/补位的冲突，以及日本定位球防守高点劣势。
factor_inputs.schedule_environment: Houston noon kickoff creates heat/tempo uncertainty; apply small dampener to sustained pressing and late tempo.
factor_inputs.market: No complete same-source odds snapshot available.

brazil.rank_source: C组第三轮复盘 and bracket mark Brazil as 1C
trend_notes: C组第一，净胜球优势明显
第三轮 3-0 属争头名高位尾部兑现
Vinicius Junior local form_status_1_5=4.0

japan.rank_source: F组第三轮复盘 and bracket mark Japan as 2F
trend_notes: 小组第二出线
上田绮世、伊东纯也、镰田大地、板仓滉、佐野海舟状态分突出
第三轮 1-1 瑞典为平局收益场景，player_state 第三轮完整分钟仍需复核

brazil.note: 本地 form_status_1_5=4.0，未见新增伤停。
年龄与淘汰赛负荷需 T-75/赛前新闻复核。

japan.note: 第三轮复盘记录关键扑救。

巴西.tactical_summary: 巴西在苏格兰 0-3 中通过 Vinicius 左路和 Bruno Guimaraes 肋部输送兑现早球/继续进攻尾部；日本则通过纪律、边路组织和瑞典 1-1 的比赛管理证明强队对抗和低事件平局能力。关键是巴西左路个人突破与日本整体压迫/补位的冲突，以及日本定位球防守高点劣势。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Selective press only; avoid full-match press bonus.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Moderate positive; Japan can still trap wide.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Cap with player_state to avoid duplicating Vinicius form.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Use as Japan counter branch, not broad Brazil downgrade.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: If Japan back three doubles wide lane, reduce magnitude.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Do not stack with generic aerial superiority beyond this factor.

defensive_line_risk.model_note: Risk rises if Brazil chase with both fullbacks high.

coach_substitution_risk.model_note: Small late-quality support, not a scoreline tail by itself.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Keep favorite ceiling branch alive if first goal comes early.

model_should_adjust: Brazil wide/transition ceiling is high but rest-defense risk keeps Japan counter branch live
Japan set-piece-defense risk should be isolated rather than broad defense downgrade
red_team_should_challenge: Japan left-side containment plan against Vinicius
whether Brazil's Scotland early-goal script overstates knockout repeatability

日本.tactical_summary: 巴西在苏格兰 0-3 中通过 Vinicius 左路和 Bruno Guimaraes 肋部输送兑现早球/继续进攻尾部；日本则通过纪律、边路组织和瑞典 1-1 的比赛管理证明强队对抗和低事件平局能力。关键是巴西左路个人突破与日本整体压迫/补位的冲突，以及日本定位球防守高点劣势。

pressing_adjustment.model_note: Brazil press resistance caps this positive.

build_up_resistance_adjustment.model_note: Use modestly; do not overrate against elite athletic press.

transition_attack_adjustment.model_note: Apply mainly to Brazil fullback-space moments.

transition_defense_risk.model_note: Do not turn into a large defensive downgrade if back three starts.

wide_channel_advantage.model_note: Reduce if Japan select extra left-side cover.

central_control_advantage.model_note: Near neutral; official central screen decides.

set_piece_advantage.model_note: Keep separate from general defense rating to avoid blanket downgrade.

game_state_tendency.model_note: Use for low-event resistance if level; does not imply prediction.

model_should_adjust: Brazil wide/transition ceiling is high but rest-defense risk keeps Japan counter branch live
Japan set-piece-defense risk should be isolated rather than broad defense downgrade
red_team_should_challenge: Japan left-side containment plan against Vinicius
whether Brazil's Scotland early-goal script overstates knockout repeatability
